author: Peter From Denmark
title: Where did the album and artist photos go?
content:
I just noticed that all the cover- and artist photos are missing. Tried to reinstall, but didn't help. I'm also using the app in Apple Carplay - and no photos here either. 

The sound is still top notch

author: scsj15
title: nyt jeg ved endnu ikke hvor god den er?

author: ThisNameIsNotTaken999
title: Crashes on smb, otherwise nice
content: Great player otherwise, but crashes frequently when playing over smb. I use an old dedicated ipad 4, 10.3.4 as "tabletop player" for local files, and had high hopes - but the crashes, ans sometimes weird pauses and song restarts and jumps make it un-usable. Otherwise i'd gladly pay a few bucks for premium.

author: Nerosus
title: Ingen Support
content:
Fugere ret godt med lokale filer og har ingen reklamer. Men dens online funktion virker ikke, hvilket er grunden til jeg valgte at prøve den.

hver 1-3 sang stopper den med at spille og loader uendeligt. Hvis jeg går en sang tilbage, og frem igen fortsætter den afspilningen. Men stopper igen 1-3 numre senere.

Det er også et kæmpe besvær hvis man vil slette en specifik sang i en spil liste, da søge functionen lader en slette sange fra listen.

Hvad være er, deres support svare aldrig tilbage.

author: StudioP84
title: Bedste afspiller
content: Flacbox er den bedste afspiller for lokale flac filer jeg har prøvet indtil videre, kan varmt anbefales

author: Hmmmm hmm
title: No use for me at All
content: Crashes every time I try to connect via SMB.

author: KurtSF!
title: Break Down
content:
Used it on an iPad with iOS 9 for playing FLAC files. At least once in every album the app suddenly terminates. When started again it starts playing approx. 10 sec. before the point where it terminated - and terminate again. The files can be played by other apps and by my Node2 without problems. 
You should really focus on better reliability!

author: Henrik Ørstedo
title: Screws up playlists
content:
The application ignores the sequense the songs are added - and dictates it’s own.

Generelly speaking it does not support playlists.

author: Nytrup
title: Best musicplayer I have tried!
content: So easy to use... It is so convenient to just ad mp3/Flac/waw files to dropbox 😀
